title: Zombie Plague 2 - Hardcore Zombie Apocalypse
description: Zombie Plague Mod 2 is a mod that greatly complicates the gameplay! Now your main enemies are bloodthirsty zombies.
body:
![](https://i.postimg.cc/DwDqkmD0/preview.png)
# Zombie Plague Mod 2

* **Now your main enemies are bloodthirsty zombies. Zombies will never leave you alone. They can dig blocks, throw garbage and not only. Food, drinks and medicine are now your main resource, without which you will not live long. The mod adds a lot of new mechanics and interesting features that you have to study and test for yourself!**

# Weapons

* **The mod adds a detailed weapon to Minecraft with high-quality effects and animations. There are a lot of weapons in ZPM 2, so everyone can choose their favorite means of destroying enemies!**
![](https://i.postimg.cc/fRqT8ryQ/2023-06-21-12-05-05.png)

* **Also, you can put modules on the weapon!**
![](https://i.postimg.cc/25NXNzVQ/2023-06-20-10-48-42.png)
![](https://i.postimg.cc/x8V4nnxD/2023-06-21-12-07-25.png)

# ZOMBIES

* **Zombies are now your most important enemies. They will do anything to get you out of bunker! They can dig blocks, throw garbage and not only. And if you join the battle with them, then you have a chance to catch the dangerous Zombie Plague virus, which is almost impossible to cure...**
![](https://i.postimg.cc/gk1JjSpy/2023-06-20-11-01-10.png)

# Generation

* **Now, traveling around the world, you will encounter tents, ruins, secret laboratories, and even huge procedurally generated cities on your way...**
![](https://i.postimg.cc/vByXstDb/2023-06-07-17-32-33.png)
![](https://i.postimg.cc/Wz29MwPX/2023-06-20-10-46-14.png)

# Conclusion

* **That's not all! There are still a lot of mechanics you have to study and check. Download the mod, test yourself for durability**

# [DISCORD](https://discord.com/invite/SrxSSsFv5F)
